get.description: Upgrades to a WebSocket connection for realtime database change notifications. Supports Bearer JWT, apikey header/query param, or anonymous (defaults to anon role). WebSocket protocol errors (RT-0000 through RT-0007) are delivered as JSON messages over the connection, not as HTTP responses.

401.description: `RT-0100` Invalid or expired access token | `RT-0101` Token version revoked | `RT-0102` Invalid API key | `RT-0103` API key does not belong to this project | `RT-0104` Authorization header must use Bearer scheme | `RT-0105` Unrecognized JWT role

404.description: `RT-0200` Project not found | `RT-0201` Project not found

503.description: `RT-0300` Connection limit reached

get.description: Returns this OpenAPI 3.1 specification document as JSON.
Static 200 liveness probe. Returns {"status":"ok"} if the process is running. Does not check dependencies.
Runs dependency health checks (database, cache, sidecars) with a 2-second timeout. Hard check failures return 503; soft check failures return 200 with 'degraded' status per check.

200.description: Service is ready (all hard checks passed). Soft checks may report degraded status.

503.description: Service is not ready (one or more hard checks failed)

code.description: Stable error code in DOMAIN-NNNN format

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page. Empty string when no more results.

has_more.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

ErrorEnvelope.description: Standard error response envelope. Used by shared error responses (400, 401, etc.).

Organization.description: An organization that owns one or more projects.

Project.description: A project with its own database schema, API keys, and configuration.

AuthResponse.description: Token response returned by signup and login.

VectorTableRecord.description: Metadata record for a vector table.

CronJob.description: A scheduled cron job managed by pg_cron.

CronJobHistory.description: Execution history entry for a cron job.

start_time.description: May be null if the job has not started yet.

end_time.description: May be null if the job has not completed yet.

StorageBucket.description: A storage bucket that holds objects.

StorageObject.description: A file stored in a storage bucket.

metadata.description: Base64-encoded user-provided upload metadata (raw JSON bytes)

APIKeyWithSecret.description: API key with raw secret. Returned only at creation time - the raw_key is shown once and never stored.

role.description: PostgreSQL role this key maps to

ProjectWithKeys.description: Project details including API keys. Returned only at creation time - keys are shown once.

db_connection_string.description: Pooled connection string (shown once, omitted in service_role pooling mode)

ReadinessResponse.description: Readiness probe response with per-dependency check results.

status.description: Overall readiness status. 'not_ready' when any hard check fails.

checks.description: Per-dependency check results keyed by dependency name (e.g. 'database', 'cache', 'postgrest').

status.description: Check status: 'ok' = healthy, 'error' = hard check failed (gates 503), 'degraded' = soft check failed (informational only).

message.description: Sanitized error message. Only present when status is not 'ok'.

TableSummary.description: Summary metadata for a database table.

TableDetail.description: Full schema detail for a database table including columns, constraints, and indexes.

ForeignKey.description: Foreign key constraint on a table.

ExecuteResult.description: Result of a SQL query execution.

ResultColumn.description: Column metadata from a SQL query result.

AdminBearer.description: Platform admin secret token. Required for /v1/platform/* routes.

AnonKey.name: apikey
AnonKey.description: Project anon API key. Grants unauthenticated access subject to RLS policies.

ServiceRoleKey.name: apikey
ServiceRoleKey.description: Project service_role API key. Bypasses RLS. Required for admin operations (bucket CRUD, cron, vectors, stats).

ProjectRef.name: ref
ProjectRef.description: Project reference slug (resolved to project ID server-side)

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Keyset pagination cursor (UUID of last item)

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of results per page
